title: Nimpress config
description: Configuration for a nimpress site. Every field has a default, so a config can be as small as a title. A nimpress.config.ts using defineConfig gets the same descriptions through the exported types and additionally accepts functions such as auth.guard.

title.description: Site title shown in the header and the tab.

logo.description: Header logo url, absolute or under assetUrlBase.

github.description: Repository url rendered as the header GitHub link.

brand.description: Brand colors written onto the theme tokens.

footer.description: Site wide footer line, overridable per page with the footer frontmatter field.

link.description: Route or url the entry opens.

gate.description: Gate value a viewer must satisfy to see the entry.

auth.description: OAuth 2.0 session login. The build time guard function for gated pages needs a nimpress.config.ts, json carries no functions.

clientId.description: OAuth client id of this site.

headers.description: Extra headers sent to the auth endpoints.

endpoints.description: Endpoint overrides when discovery is unavailable.

client.description: Path to a client module exporting authFunctions and subscribeFunctions.

appSlug.description: App slug the subscription registers under.

meta.description: SEO, robots, llms.txt, webmanifest, and security.txt emission.

keywords.description: Site wide keywords merged into every page head.

localeAlternates.description: Locale codes emitted as hreflang alternates.

organization.description: Organization JSON LD object written on every page.

custom.description: Full robots.txt replacement, overrides everything else.

summary.description: One line summary at the top of llms.txt.

full.description: Also emit llms-full.txt with every page body.

site.description: Canonical site identity used for absolute urls, sitemap, and social cards.

url.description: Canonical origin, required for sitemap, feeds, and absolute social urls.

assetsDir.description: Root assets folder copied into the build. Never inside contentDir.

assetUrlBase.description: Url base the assets folder serves under.

exclude.description: Slug prefixes excluded from the site.

defaultFrontmatter.description: Frontmatter defaults applied to every page that leaves the field unset.

defaultFrontmatterExclude.description: Path prefixes the frontmatter defaults skip.

banner.description: Dev server banner, false disables it.

title.description: Banner title, defaults to the site title.

company.description: Company name in the banner footer.

version.description: Version label, defaults to the consumer package version.

css.description: Extra stylesheets loaded after the framework styles.

vite.description: Vite overrides merged into the site and harness configs.

modules.description: Component workshop systems, one entry per component library.

name.description: System identifier, the folder name under the modules route and the value component pages reference in data.system.

source.description: Local component tree, resolved as <source>/<Name>/<Name>.<ext> or <source>/<Name>.<ext>.

package.description: Released npm package the harness imports components from when they do not resolve from source.

version.description: Version pin recorded on exported pages.

css.description: Stylesheets loaded inside the harness iframe.

setup.description: Module replacing the harness bootstrap: default export carries install(app) and companion for vue, a bare function for svelte.

harness.description: Relative path to the system harness component wrapping every story, .ts, .tsx, .vue, or .svelte.

port.description: Fixed dev port for this system's harness server.

visibility.description: dev-only keeps the system in nimpress dev and out of the built bundle.
